languages.text: "Ювенна, ну конечно... Она всегда просчитывает свои шаги на несколько ходов вперед. Избавившись от отпрыска Гапраков, она убила двух гроксов одним выстрелом: сравняла численность наших войск с врагом и внесла раздор в мой лагерь. Пока все были заняты поисками пропавшего подкрепления, эта изменница плела вокруг меня сети лжи!"

traits.locale_text: "Ювенна, ну конечно... Она всегда просчитывает свои шаги на несколько ходов вперед. Избавившись от отпрыска Гапраков, она убила двух гроксов одним выстрелом: сравняла численность наших войск с врагом и внесла раздор в мой лагерь. Пока все были заняты поисками пропавшего подкрепления, эта изменница плела вокруг меня сети лжи!"

languages.text: "Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"
languages.original_text: "Ювенна, ну конечно... Она всегда просчитывает свои шаги на несколько ходов вперед. Избавившись от отпрыска Гапраков, она убила двух гроксов одним выстрелом: сравняла численность наших войск с врагом и внесла раздор в мой лагерь. Пока все были заняты поисками пропавшего подкрепления, эта изменница плела вокруг меня сети лжи!"

"Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"

"Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"

languages.text: "Juvenna, aber natürlich ... Sie berechnet ihr Handeln immer mehrere Schritte voraus. Mit der Beseitigung des Gaprak-Lords hat sie zwei Groxe mit einer Klappe geschlagen. Sie hat unsere Truppenstärke an die des Feindes angeglichen und Misstrauen in meinem Lager gesät. Während alle mit der Suche nach der verschwundenen Verstärkung beschäftigt waren, hat diese Verräterin ein Netz aus Lügen um mich herum gesponnen!"
languages.original_text: "Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna, aber natürlich ... Sie berechnet ihr Handeln immer mehrere Schritte voraus. Mit der Beseitigung des Gaprak-Lords hat sie zwei Groxe mit einer Klappe geschlagen. Sie hat unsere Truppenstärke an die des Feindes angeglichen und Misstrauen in meinem Lager gesät. Während alle mit der Suche nach der verschwundenen Verstärkung beschäftigt waren, hat diese Verräterin ein Netz aus Lügen um mich herum gesponnen!"

languages.text: “尤文娜，当然了……她总是走一步算三步。除掉贾帕克家的子嗣，可谓一箭双雕：既拉平了敌人与我们的兵力差距，又在我的阵营里埋下了不和的种子。在所有人都忙着搜寻失踪的援军时，那个叛徒却用谎言将我彻底蒙蔽！”
languages.original_text: "Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜，当然了……她总是走一步算三步。除掉贾帕克家的子嗣，可谓一箭双雕：既拉平了敌人与我们的兵力差距，又在我的阵营里埋下了不和的种子。在所有人都忙着搜寻失踪的援军时，那个叛徒却用谎言将我彻底蒙蔽！”

languages.text: « Juvenna... Bien sûr... Elle a toujours plusieurs coups d'avance. En se débarrassant de l'héritier des Gaprak, elle a fait d'une pierre deux coups : nos troupes égalent désormais celles de l'ennemi, et elle a semé la discorde dans mon camp. Pendant que nous étions occupés à chercher les renforts disparus, cette traîtresse tissait sa toile de mensonges tout autour de moi ! »
languages.original_text: "Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"

traits.locale_text: « Juvenna... Bien sûr... Elle a toujours plusieurs coups d'avance. En se débarrassant de l'héritier des Gaprak, elle a fait d'une pierre deux coups : nos troupes égalent désormais celles de l'ennemi, et elle a semé la discorde dans mon camp. Pendant que nous étions occupés à chercher les renforts disparus, cette traîtresse tissait sa toile de mensonges tout autour de moi ! »

languages.text: «Juvenna, cómo no... Siempre calcula sus movimientos con varias jugadas de antelación. Al deshacerse del heredero Gaprak, mata dos groxes de un solo tiro: nos priva de efectivos para quedar a la altura del enemigo, y a la vez siembra la discordia en mi propio bando. ¡Mientras todos se dedicaban a buscar los refuerzos desaparecidos, esa traidora urdía una red de mentiras a mi alrededor!».
languages.original_text: "Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"

traits.locale_text: «Juvenna, cómo no... Siempre calcula sus movimientos con varias jugadas de antelación. Al deshacerse del heredero Gaprak, mata dos groxes de un solo tiro: nos priva de efectivos para quedar a la altura del enemigo, y a la vez siembra la discordia en mi propio bando. ¡Mientras todos se dedicaban a buscar los refuerzos desaparecidos, esa traidora urdía una red de mentiras a mi alrededor!».

languages.text: "Juvenna, elbette... Hamlelerini her zaman birkaç adım önceden hesaplar. Gaprak vârisini ortadan kaldırarak bir taşla iki groks vurmuş oldu... Asker sayımızı düşmanla eşitledi ve yandaşlarıma nifak tohumları ekti. Herkes kayıp destek kuvvetleri aramakla meşgulken o hain, etrafımda bir yalanlar ağı örüyordu!"
languages.original_text: "Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna, elbette... Hamlelerini her zaman birkaç adım önceden hesaplar. Gaprak vârisini ortadan kaldırarak bir taşla iki groks vurmuş oldu... Asker sayımızı düşmanla eşitledi ve yandaşlarıma nifak tohumları ekti. Herkes kayıp destek kuvvetleri aramakla meşgulken o hain, etrafımda bir yalanlar ağı örüyordu!"

languages.text: 「ジュベナ、当然のことながら…彼女はいつも数歩先の動きを計算している。ギャプラク家の跡取りを討ち取ったことで、彼女は一挙に二つの成果を上げた。我々の部隊の数を敵と均衡させ、そして私の陣営に不和を植え付けたのだ。皆が欠けた増援を探し求めることに気を取られていた間に、その裏切り者は私の周りに嘘の糸口を張っていたのだ！」
languages.original_text: "Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"

traits.locale_text: 「ジュベナ、当然のことながら…彼女はいつも数歩先の動きを計算している。ギャプラク家の跡取りを討ち取ったことで、彼女は一挙に二つの成果を上げた。我々の部隊の数を敵と均衡させ、そして私の陣営に不和を植え付けたのだ。皆が欠けた増援を探し求めることに気を取られていた間に、その裏切り者は私の周りに嘘の糸口を張っていたのだ！」
